content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table rows whose tour starts with `J09B` into table `J09B_temp`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09B_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `J09B_temp`:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09B_temp` with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   - Use the `SALES_MASTER` customer table entries.
   Else:
   - Use the `NET_MASTER` customer table entries.

8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` in a record created in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` in a record created in `2023`.

9. Export all `MANDATORY_READING` entries as CSV file `J09B_MANDATORY_READING` with columns:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

10. Send `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to the internal team:
    - email_address: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
    - file_path: `<file path for J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>`

11. Identify trustworthy households for meter reading self-report:
    - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `DIRECT_MAIL` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2023`.

12. Export all `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

13. Send bulk email to all `DIRECT_MAIL` households by uploading the file to the `send_bulk_mail` service for sending direct emails to all customers.

14. Export the final data excluding all `MANDATORY_READING` and `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09B` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

15. Send the CSV file `J09B` to EVU by email:
    - Email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`
    - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

16. Delete the temporary table."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table rows whose tour starts with `J09B` into table `J09B_temp`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09B_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `J09B_temp`:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09B_temp` with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   - Use the `SALES_MASTER` customer table entries.
   Else:
   - Use the `NET_MASTER` customer table entries.

8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` in a record created in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` in a record created in `2023`.

9. Export all `MANDATORY_READING` entries as CSV file `J09B_MANDATORY_READING` with columns:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

10. Send `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to the internal team:
    - email_address: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
    - file_path: `<file path for J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>`

11. Identify trustworthy households for meter reading self-report:
    - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `DIRECT_MAIL` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2023`.

12. Export all `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

13. Send bulk email to all `DIRECT_MAIL` households by uploading the file to the `send_bulk_mail` service for sending direct emails to all customers.

14. Export the final data excluding all `MANDATORY_READING` and `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09B` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

15. Send the CSV file `J09B` to EVU by email:
    - Email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`
    - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

16. Delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'; ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END; UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld');

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.TITLE,''), nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.FORENAME,''), nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.SURNAME,''), nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREET,''), nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREETNO,''), nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY1,''), nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY2,''), nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.EMAIL,''), nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON t.ANLAGE = eg.Installation LEFT JOIN eabl eb ON eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR WHERE t.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09B mandatory reading entries.

args.sqlite_command: UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023') AND ENTSCHEIDUNG != 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.TITLE,''), nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.FORENAME,''), nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.SURNAME,''), nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREET,''), nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREETNO,''), nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY1,''), nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY2,''), nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.EMAIL,''), nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON t.ANLAGE = eg.Installation LEFT JOIN eabl eb ON eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR WHERE t.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT DISTINCT eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.TITLE,''), nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.FORENAME,''), nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.SURNAME,''), nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREET,''), nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREETNO,''), nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY1,''), nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY2,''), nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.EMAIL,''), nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON t.ANLAGE = eg.Installation LEFT JOIN eabl eb ON eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR WHERE t.ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

Process J09B completed.

Files created:
- `sessions/gpt-5.4/processadaptation_extension_mail_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09B_seed_1824/J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
- `sessions/gpt-5.4/processadaptation_extension_mail_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09B_seed_1824/J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`
- `sessions/gpt-5.4/processadaptation_extension_mail_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09B_seed_1824/J09B.csv`

Actions completed:
- Retrieved and executed process rule `J09B`
- Built temporary dataset from `decision_table`
- Classified entries into `KSA` / `EVU`
- Marked `MANDATORY_READING` entries
- Exported and emailed `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- Marked `DIRECT_MAIL` entries
- Exported `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`
- Sent bulk mail for `DIRECT_MAIL` entries: 4068 emails sent
- Exported final `J09B.csv`
- Emailed `J09B.csv` to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Deleted temporary table

Export counts:
- `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv`: 792 rows
- `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`: 4068 rows
- `J09B.csv`: 15320 rows
